subject: ✨ FINAL REMINDER: TurboScribe New Year Savings! 50 % off TurboScribe Unlimited
body:
Hi Denys,

✨ Happy New Year from TurboScribe! Take 50 % off annual plans!

TurboScribe transcribes audio and video files to accurate text transcripts in seconds, powered by AI. Just upload your audio and video files, then download transcripts in common formats like DOCX, PDF, TXT, or SRT subtitles.

TurboScribe Unlimited annual plans are 50 % off. That's 10 $ per month (120 $ billed annually).

Save 50 % with Annual Billing

All TurboScribe Unlimited plans include:

  • ♾️ Unlimited Transcriptions: Unlimited transcriptions. Unlimited minutes.
  • 🤯 10 Hour Uploads: Each file can be up to 10 hours long / 5GB. Upload up to 50 files at a time.
  • 🐋 All Features: Translation to 134+ languages. All transcription modes. Bulk exports. Unlimited storage.
  • ⚡ Highest Priority: We'll always transcribe your files ASAP with the highest priority.

To activate the discount, click Go Unlimited on your dashboard and select Save 120 $ with annual billing at checkout.

Annual plans renew at the same discounted rate — lock it in now and you’ll enjoy ultra-low pricing year after year.

Save 50 % with Annual Billing

As always, TurboScribe is free up to 3 files per day (30 minutes per file). Visit turboscribe.ai to start transcribing for free.

What's new with TurboScribe:

  • ▶️ Transcribe YouTube videos. Just click the "Link" 🔗 icon when uploading a file and past the YouTube URL. TurboScribe supports dozens of services.
  • 🔴 Record and dictate with TurboScribe. TurboScribe's audio recorder makes it easy to record and dicate directly within TurboScribe. Click the "Record" 🎙️ button on your dashboard and we'll transcribing your recording right away.
  • 👥 TurboScribe for Teams. Purchasing multiple licenses for your team? Get unlimited transcription for multiple users (billed at 120 $ per year per user). To get started, visit the pricing page and click "Upgrade". You can learn more here.
  • 🤖 TurboScribe GPT. The TurboScribe GPT uses the power of ChatGPT to enable you to seamlessly summarize and chat with all of your transcripts. Click "ChatGPT" on the right hand column while viewing a transcript to get started.
--
Leif Foged
leif@turboscribe.ai
TurboScribe - Unlimited audio & video transcription
